title: LSHUZIYU, 2-PACK, 255x3mm-3T, Arbor 25.4mm with 22.23-20-16mm Washer, Brush Cutter Blade, Trimmer Weed Blade.
features: Arbor 25.4mm with 22.23-20-15.88mm circular adaptor washer. UNIVERSAL FIT For Circular Arbor. For all circular arbor equipment brand. Husqvarna,Echo Homelite,Jonsered Stihl Shindaiwa Redmax Honda Kawasaki Ryobi etc
SK-5 steel is estimated to last 10x longer life than normal Carbon Steel.
Excellent for cutting tough and tangled weeds, undergrowth and light bush with high efficiency
SHUZIYU For Premium Quality Only, We started our tool business in 2007,. Supply the best qualtiy tools with very good price
description: Product Description CUT GRASS CUT SHRUB CUT BAMBOO CUT SMALL TREE Arbor 1" with washer The blade arbor is 1" (25.4mm) We also have three washer: 1"-7/8" 1"-20mm 1"-5/8" Make sure the blade can fix all arbor size of the brush cutter in the market. Fix the equipment Before order the blade, please make sure your brush cutter can fix the max diameter blade more than 8". some brush cutter in the market fix max 6" blade can't use this. Make sure your brush cutter trimmer head can be take off like the picture, or similar have arbor can fix the blade. Actually most brush cutter in the market is this kind. Can't use on this Some brush cutter like MAKITA XRU02Z, they design for trimmer line use only. the trimmer head can't take off. don't have the arbor for fix my blade. So if you using this kind of brush cutter, please not buy this blade.
